---
description: Creates a standalone Angular component with signals, OnPush, BEM scss, and spec file
---

Create a standalone Angular 18 component following these rules:

- standalone: true, changeDetection: OnPush
- Use signals for state, inject() for DI
- Use @if/@for control flow
- BEM naming in SCSS
- Include .spec.ts with basic test

Files to create:

- src/app/{name}/{name}.component.ts
- src/app/{name}/{name}.component.html
- src/app/{name}/{name}.component.scss
- src/app/{name}/{name}.spec.ts
